sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:34:56');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = date_trunc('minute', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_trunc('day', event_time) AS truncated_day FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, date_trunc('second', event_time) AS truncated_second FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
